name: file-io
notes: File I/O is runtime-owned. 0.5.0 exposes common POSIX file, directory, symlink, chmod/chown, archive shell-out, scp, ssh, and bash entry points. Read buffers, line iterators, directory listing arrays, stdout/stderr/stdin stream objects, and indexed writes are planned as Clyth-space wrappers once runtime allocation and owned string buffers stabilize.
